next_steps: Obtain emergent thyroid function panel including TSH, Free T4, and T3
Send serum and CSF for autoimmune encephalitis panel, specifically anti-NMDA receptor antibodies
Initiate continuous EEG monitoring to rule out occult non-convulsive status epilepticus
Measure serum ceruloplasmin, copper levels, and 24-hour urine copper excretion
Measure plasma total homocysteine and methylmalonic acid to evaluate for metabolic disturbances
Send spot urine for porphobilinogen and delta-aminolevulinic acid to rule out porphyria
Assess for occult malignancy via whole-body CT or PET/CT scan
